zh.lifeSummary: 當Moreiddig Warwyn ap Drymbenog of Cantref Selyf Vaughan於大約1097年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾坎崔福時，他的父親Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog49歲，母親Gwenllian Iestyn29歲。他於1115年與Elinor ferch Rhys在威爾士結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Moreiddig Warwyn ap Drymbenog of Cantref Selyf Vaughan于大约1097年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾坎崔福时，他的父亲Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog49岁，母亲Gwenllian Iestyn29岁。他于1115年与Elinor ferch Rhys在威尔士结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Vaughan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

variants.name: Von
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Veon
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .

variants.name: Vaughn
meanings: Welsh: variant of   Vaughan  .

variants.name: Vaughns
meanings: Welsh: variant of Vaughan , with English patronymic -s.

nameMeanings.name: Warwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern: compound of cār ‘love’ + (g)wyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Cantref
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic: unexplained.

nameMeanings.name: Selyf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): from the Middle English personal name Sa(h)ulf (Old English Sǣwulf, from sǣ ‘sea’ + wulf ‘wolf’).
North German: nickname from Low German self ‘self’ for a self-important person.

variants.name: Selph
meanings: Hebrew: A male name derived from the Scripture name Selah or Shelah, signifying a weapon, missile; literally sent, shooting forth. The Hebrew Sola is a rock (fig. of refuge), whence Selah, Sela (Petra), the chief city of the Edomites.

variants.name: Selfe
meanings: English: variant of   Self  .

variants.name: Silverstone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Aron, Emanuel, Herschel.

English: habitational name from Silverstone (Northamptonshire), probably from the Old English personal name Sigewulf (genitive Sigewulfes) or Sǣwulf (genitive Sǣwulfes; see Self ) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Silberstein  .

en.lifeSummary: When Moreiddig Warwyn ap Drymbenog of Cantref Selyf Vaughan was born about 1097, in Cantref, Breconshire, Wales, his father, Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog, was 49 and his mother, Gwenllian Iestyn, was 29. He married Elinor ferch Rhys in 1115, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in his hometown.

fr.Cantref Selyf, Breconshire, Wales: Cantref, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Moreiddig Warwyn ap Drymbenog of Cantref Selyf Vaughan est né environ 1097, à Cantref, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian Iestyn, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elinor ferch Rhys en 1115, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Moreiddig Warwyn ap Drymbenog of Cantref Selyf Vaughan um 1097 in Cantref, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog 49 und seine Mutter Gwenllian Iestyn 29. Er hat 1115 in Wales Elinor ferch Rhys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Moreiddig Warwyn ap Drymbenog of Cantref Selyf Vaughan è nato il circa 1097 nel Cantref, Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian Iestyn, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elinor ferch Rhys nel 1115, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Moreiddig Warwyn ap Drymbenog of Cantref Selyf Vaughanが約1097年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアカントレフで生まれた時，父Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniogは49歳，母Gwenllian Iestynは29歳であった。1115年にウェールズでElinor ferch Rhysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Moreiddig Warwyn ap Drymbenog of Cantref Selyf Vaughan(이)가 대략 1097년 웨일스 브레콘실르 캔트레프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian Iestyn(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1115년 웨일스에서 Elinor ferch Rhys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Moreiddig Warwyn ap Drymbenog of Cantref Selyf Vaughan nasceu aproximadamente 1097, em Cantref, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian Iestyn, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elinor ferch Rhys em 1115, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Moreiddig Warwyn ap Drymbenog of Cantref Selyf Vaughan родился около 1097 г. в местности кантреф, брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian Iestyn, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elinor ferch Rhys в 1115 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Moreiddig Warwyn ap Drymbenog of Cantref Selyf Vaughan nació aproximadamente 1097, en Cantref, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Drymbenog ap Maenyrch, Lord of Brycheiniog, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Gwenllian Iestyn, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elinor ferch Rhys en 1115, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en su pueblo.
